debug_info.goal:
case fst
α β γ δ ι : Type
p q : @MyProd α (@MyProd β γ)
⊢ @MyProd.fst α (@MyProd β γ) p = @MyProd.fst α (@MyProd β γ) q

failed_attempts:
from the equality of the pairs.
    have h₄ : p.snd.fst = q.snd.fst := by
      have h₅ := congr_arg (fun x => x.fst) h₃
      simp at h₅
      <;> simp_all
    exact h₄
  have h₃ : p.snd.snd = q.snd.snd := by
    have h₃' : p = q := by
      -- We use the fact that the product type is extensional and the components are equal.
      apply MyProd.ext
      <;> simp_all [MyProd.ext_iff]
      <;> (try cases p <;> cases q <;> simp_all)
      <;> (try aesop)
    -- Extract the equality of the second components from the equality of the pairs.
    have h₄ : p.snd = q.snd := by
      have h₅ := congr_arg (fun x => x.snd) h₃'
      simp at h₅
      <;> simp_all
    -- Extract the equality of the second components from the equality of the pairs.
    have h₅ : p.snd.snd = q.snd.snd := by
      have h₆ := congr_arg (fun x => x.snd) h₄
      simp at h₆
      <;> simp_all
    exact h₅
  have h₄ : p = q := by
    apply MyProd.ext
    <;> simp_all [MyProd.ext_iff]
    <;>
    (try cases p <;> cases q <;> simp_all) <;>
    (try aesop)
  exact h₄
